title: gentianopsis ciliata subsp. blepharophora
intro: Gentianopsis ciliata subsp. blepharophora, also known as the fringed gentian, is a flowering plant species in the gentian family that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Gentianopsis ciliata subsp. blepharophora include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Gentianopsis ciliata subsp. blepharophora may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal and health benefits.
